title: Senior exodus: hidden costs of big tech scale
meta_description: Senior engineers quit big tech for 3 reasons — none are salary. Learn what really burns them out and how to measure it with Redis 7.2, PostgreSQL 16, and 3 concrete numbers.
prewritten_tweet:
Most seniors don’t leave big tech for money.

They leave because their PR sits in review for days while prod incidents pile up.

https://kubaik.github.io/senior-exodus-hidden-costs-of-big-tech-scale

#TechNews #Tech #Technology #PostgreSQL
